name: Lemon Poppy Seed Bundt Cake (Gxdb48a)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine the cake mix, pudding mix, cinnamon, nutmeg, poppy seed, oil and warm water. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
2. Pour the batter into a greased and sugared bundt pan that has been coated with flour.
3. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for about 45 minutes or until done.
4. Allow the cake to cool in the pan for 10 minutes before removing it.
5. Invert the cooled cake and immediately drizzle with glaze made by mixing powdered sugar and enough lemon juice to create a thin glaze.
